rationale: The citing paper explicitly says it "extends empirical competitive-promotion work" and centers on discount-depth response and cannibalization, while the cited paper is directly about competitive vs. loyalty promotions, customization level, and optimal price-cut depth/profit. That overlap in focal constructs suggests a plausible substantive prior/theory or comparison source rather than an incidental background mention, even though the raw evidence here is only an exact DOI match.
